channel.title: Go on Blagoy Simandoff
channel.description: Recent content in Go on Blagoy Simandoff

item.title: We built a traffic simulator for Cork in two months
item.description: How six CS students at UCC shipped a web-based urban traffic simulator in two months — the stack, the war stories, and the architectural decisions that actually worked.

item.title: GCP's Signed URLs & A Browser Oddity
item.description: Learn how to handle GCP signed URLs in browsers, common pitfalls with Content-Type headers, and a solution to the 403 Forbidden error when uploading files to Google Cloud Storage.
